description_long: This object is a simple wooden easel, characterized by a broad, flat rectangular panel supported by a single vertical post. The panel is slightly angled and appears to be made from a single piece of wood, with clean, straight edges and a uniform brown finish. The supporting post is centrally attached to the bottom of the panel, extending downward to serve as the main leg or support. There are no visible crossbars, braces, or additional legs, giving the structure a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. The surface of the panel is smooth and unadorned, suitable for displaying signs, boards, or artwork in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or public squares. The overall construction suggests a lightweight, portable design, but lacks any visible mechanisms for adjustment or canvas holding.
description: A minimalist wooden easel with a broad rectangular panel and a single central support post, finished in a uniform brown color. The design is simple, smooth, and functional, suitable for displaying boards or signs.
description_view_0: A narrow side view showing the thin profile of the rectangular panel and the single vertical support post.
description_view_1: A full frontal view displaying the wide, flat rectangular panel and the central support post extending downward.
description_view_2: A narrow side view similar to view 0, highlighting the slimness of the panel and the straight support post.
description_view_3: A rear view showing the back of the rectangular panel and the central support post, mirroring the front but without any display features.
